title: Most mammalian mRNAs are conserved targets of microRNAs
search_query: Most mammalian mRNAs are conserved targets of microRNAs
notes: MicroRNAs (miRNAs) are small endogenous RNAs that pair to sites in mRNAs to direct post-transcriptional repression. Many sites that match the miRNA seed (nucleotides 2-7), particularly those in 3' untranslated regions (3'UTRs), are preferentially conserved. Here, we overhauled ou…
